\tzpentry{ID3472}{Number Density}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3472 introduces Number Density as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ N r^{D} = 1 \quad\Longrightarrow\quad D = -\frac{\log N}{\log r}. \]
